mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO wrong_question (question, answer, subject, knowledge_point, user_id, mastered, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{question}, #{answer}, #{subject}, #{knowledgePoint}, #{userId}, #{mastered}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update: UPDATE wrong_question SET question = #{question}, answer = #{answer}, subject = #{subject}, knowledge_point = #{knowledgePoint}, mastered = #{mastered}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wrong_question WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wrong_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND mastered = true
SELECT subject, COUNT(*) as count FROM wrong_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY subject
